languages.text: [Пригубить вино и вздохнуть] "Ты прав, Нунциус — мы часть проблемы. Стоит пустить мое богатство на благо".
[Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."
languages.original_text: [Пригубить вино и вздохнуть] "Ты прав, Нунциус — мы часть проблемы. Стоит пустить мое богатство на благо".

traits.locale_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."
[Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."
[Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

languages.text: [Catar el vino y suspirar] «Tiene razón, Nuncius; nosotros somos parte del problema. Debería dar mejor uso a mi inmensa riqueza».
languages.original_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

traits.locale_text: [Catar el vino y suspirar] «Tiene razón, Nuncius; nosotros somos parte del problema. Debería dar mejor uso a mi inmensa riqueza».

languages.text: 【尝了酒之后叹了口气】“你说得对，努恩修斯，对此我们也有责任。我应该把自己的财富花在更有意义的地方才是。”
languages.original_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

traits.locale_text: 【尝了酒之后叹了口气】“你说得对，努恩修斯，对此我们也有责任。我应该把自己的财富花在更有意义的地方才是。”

languages.text: [Boire du vin et soupirer] « C'est vrai, Nuncius, nous contribuons au problème. Je devrais dépenser ma fortune à bon escient. »
languages.original_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

traits.locale_text: [Boire du vin et soupirer] « C'est vrai, Nuncius, nous contribuons au problème. Je devrais dépenser ma fortune à bon escient. »

languages.text: [Şarabın tadına bak ve iç çek] "Haklısın Nuncius... Sorunun bir parçasıyız. Servetimi iyi bir amaç için kullanmalıyım."
languages.original_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

traits.locale_text: [Şarabın tadına bak ve iç çek] "Haklısın Nuncius... Sorunun bir parçasıyız. Servetimi iyi bir amaç için kullanmalıyım."

languages.text: ［ワインを味わい、ため息をつく］「君の言う通りだ、ヌンキウス――我々も問題の一部だ。自分の富を有効に使うべきだろう」
languages.original_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

traits.locale_text: ［ワインを味わい、ため息をつく］「君の言う通りだ、ヌンキウス――我々も問題の一部だ。自分の富を有効に使うべきだろう」

languages.text: [Den Wein kosten und seufzen] "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius, wir sind Teil des Problems. Ich sollte meinen Reichtum sinnvoll einsetzen."
languages.original_text: [Taste the wine and sigh] "You're right, Nuncius — we are part of the problem. I ought to put my wealth to good use."

traits.locale_text: [Den Wein kosten und seufzen] "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius, wir sind Teil des Problems. Ich sollte meinen Reichtum sinnvoll einsetzen."
